title: Mecklenburg County Sheriff Candidates Face Off
summary: WCNC's "704 Unfiltered" features the candidates challenging Garry McFadden in the upcoming Mecklenburg County sheriff primary.
charlotte_impact: The sheriff's race is crucial for local law enforcement and community safety policies.

title: North Carolina US Senate Primary Heats Up
summary: Six candidates, including Whatley and Morrow, compete for the Republican nomination in a key US Senate race.
charlotte_impact: The outcome will significantly impact the balance of power in the US Senate.

title: Man Charged with Bomb Threat at Union County Courthouse
summary: A man is facing charges after allegedly making a bomb threat at the Union County courthouse due to fear of a probation violation arrest.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the strain on local law enforcement and the court system.

title: Stabbing Near Uptown Leaves One Injured
summary: One person was hospitalized with life-threatening injuries following a stabbing incident near Uptown Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety in the Uptown area.

title: Key Races to Watch in NC District 11 Primary
summary: North Carolina's primary races in District 11 are gaining attention as diverse candidates compete for various positions.
charlotte_impact: The primary results will shape the political landscape of District 11.

title: Warmer Weather Expected This Week
summary: A warm-up is expected, with a potential record heat wave later in the week, bringing temperatures into the 70s and 80s.
charlotte_impact: Impacts daily life and outdoor activities.

title: Rape Suspect Arrested in Gaston County
summary: Robert Lee Tallent, wanted for rape in York County, South Carolina, was apprehended in Gaston County.

title: Parent Arrested for Gun Possession on School Property
summary: An upset parent was arrested for possessing a gun on Avery County school property and was taken into custody without incident.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about school safety and security measures.

title: Parents Arrested After Child Tests Positive for Narcotics
summary: Two adults in Lincoln County were arrested after their child tested positive for narcotics at a local hospital.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of drug abuse on families and children.

title: Suspect Sought in Deadly Hit-and-Run
summary: Police are searching for a woman involved in a fatal hit-and-run incident in Salisbury weeks ago; she fled the scene.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for justice and accountability in traffic-related fatalities.

title: Renters Demand Action After Safety Failures
summary: Gateway West renters in Uptown Charlotte are demanding action after safety failures led to unauthorized access and temporary housing in storage areas.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about safety and security in luxury apartments.

title: Black Political Caucus to Fight I-77 Expansion
summary: The Black Political Caucus plans to file a restraining order against NCDOT to halt the controversial I-77 toll lane expansion.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about the project's impact on Black neighborhoods.

title: Citizens Rally Against U.S. Involvement in Iran
summary: Community members in Charlotte gathered for a "Hands Off Iran" demonstration in First Ward Park to voice concerns over U.S. involvement.
charlotte_impact: Reflects local sentiment on international affairs.

title: Rising Middle East Tensions Could Impact Gas Prices
summary: Experts warn that conflict involving Iran may lead to sharper increases in gas prices in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Impacts the cost of living for local residents.

title: Violent Crime Declining in Charlotte, Says CMPD Chief
summary: CMPD Chief Estella Patterson reported to Charlotte City Council that violent crime continues to decrease in 2026.
charlotte_impact: Provides an update on public safety trends in the city.
